content: show me a pie chart of profit and loss of last 30 days

It seems there's been a misunderstanding. The provided data is for a line chart showing profit in ₹ by date for the last 30 days, not a pie chart of profit and loss. The chart displays the daily profit amounts, with the highest profit being ₹100,018.72 on 2025-04-11 and the lowest being ₹48,943.89 on 2025-04-15.
show me pie of top 5 products
The top 5 products by units sold are led by Tata Salt 1kg with 6,353 units, closely followed by Sprite 750ml with 6,033 units.
